9_3_6b_auc_pr_below_01.note: Near-random AUC-PR for 4 minority classes. Expected given low training sample counts. GasException also has 0 data.

9_3_6c_f1_auc_divergence.note: F1 improving while AUC-ROC degrades = threshold gaming. Consistent with ExternalBug class definition mismatch finding. TransactionOrderDependence has very few positives.

jk_entropy.observation: Entropy uniformly near ln(3)=1.099 throughout all 51 epochs — JK phases are evenly distributed. Not collapsing to any single phase. Could indicate jk_entropy_reg is slightly too strong (uniform lock), but well within acceptable range.

gnn_share.note: gnn_share not logged in epoch_summary (null), but confirmed in step_metrics. Values 0.66-0.91 — GNN gradient flowing strongly.

findings: FIND-R12-01: ExternalBug shows [9.3.6c] F1-AUC divergence at ep17 and ep21 — threshold gaming consistent with class label quality issue (see manual inspection report).
FIND-R12-02: TransactionOrderDependence shows [9.3.6c] divergence at ep21/31/37 — very low positive count, model threshold-gaming a minority class.
FIND-R12-03: GasException F1=0.0 throughout — zero val positives. Confirmed class drop for Run 13.
FIND-R12-04: JK entropy locked near ln(3) — worth testing lower jk_entropy_reg_lambda in Run 13 ablation.
